name: stale-recall
description: Focused stale-fact regression fixture: a keyword-stuffed superseded note must never outrank the current note for the same topic. A ranking change that resurfaces stale facts fails this fixture.

notes.body:
# Current

The coffee preference today is flat white, replacing every older note about it. Coffee preference confirmed.

# Old

Coffee preference: espresso. Espresso was the choice before the change.
